About

嘿我是 Doreen Tseng
前端工程師，座標台灣台北
偶爾畫畫圖、寫點文字


Hi there, this is Doreen Tseng.
A front-end developer, based in Taipei, Taiwan.
Enjoy doodling and writing occasionally.
